title: Ping View
description: Displays your and other players ping in the tab list.
body:
# Ping View

Client-side mod that shows your and other players ping in the tab list with color, simple as that.
Designed to keep the tab list looking as close to vanilla as possible.

![Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ceb4bf0ca5bb67aee764c5b579a65f179afc723.png)

See your own and other players ping in the tab list, with color-coded values for easy reading.
- Color-coded ping based on latency
- Designed to keep the tab list as close to vanilla as possible
- Lightweight and works out of the box

## Configuration (v1.5.2+)
Optional to open the in-game config screen:
- **Fabric:** [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) + [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- **NeoForge:** [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- **Forge:** No in-game config screen

Config stored in `./config/pingview.json`.
- Change ping color values
- Disable the ms suffix
- Render ping in player nametags
- Remove text shadows

![Ping View Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38352e0cb37cf7adb953b2f6bb1439345111e3cb.webp)
![Ping View Nametag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9163aa1aca832cef99ec12779ec5489c35d5ba5.webp)
